# terrible_community_general_shutdown (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `delay` (Number) Seconds to wait before shutdown. Passed as a parameter to the shutdown command. On Linux, macOS and OpenBSD, this is converted to minutes and rounded down. If less than 60, it is set to 0. On Solaris and FreeBSD, this represents seconds.
- `msg` (String) Message to display to users before shutdown.
- `search_paths` (String) Paths to search on the remote machine for the `shutdown` command. *Only* these paths are searched for the `shutdown` command. `PATH` is ignored in the remote node when searching for the `shutdown` command.

### Read-Only

- `shutdown` (Boolean) `true` if the machine has been shut down.
